_meta.source: IEEE Registration Authority — MA-S (36-bit) OUI registry
_meta.license: Attribution-only convention; see IEEE Registration Authority terms at https://standards.ieee.org/products-programs/regauth/
_meta.note: MA-S (36-bit) sub-allocation registry. Populate by running `uv run python scripts/refresh_ouis.py` from the repo root. This stub is committed so the lookup-degrades-gracefully scenario in the spec is reachable in CI even when IEEE is unreachable. Lookup is keyed as `aa:bb:cc:dd:e` where the 9th nibble is the sub-allocation.
